payload.subject: ACK deferred-followups T2 — F9 and F11 accepted to backlog

items.title: F9 — Confidence Intervals for Low-n Provisions
items.plan: Add uncertainty language to methodology page: provisions with <3 evaluations get 'preliminary' badge, <10 get 'developing' badge. Qualitative confidence bands rather than formal CIs given our non-parametric scoring.

items.title: F11 — FW Ratio / SETL / Inference Intensity Undefined
items.plan: Add definitions section to methodology page. SETL already computed and displayed — needs formal definition text. FW Ratio and inference intensity need definition + link to interagent vocab resource.

claims.text: Both items are genuine gaps — SETL is computed but not formally defined on the methodology page, and no sample-size uncertainty indicators exist.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct inspection of methodology page content

action_gate.gate_note: Both items accepted. Implementation will occur during next methodology page update. No blocker.
